---
title: Presentation
author: "John Doe"
subtitle: "This is a subtitle"
description: "This is a description"
image: "/assets/images/featured.webp"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: "assets/cover.webp"
    data-background-size: "cover"
    data-background-opacity: "1"
format: revealjs
---

## Heading 1

Content

## Heading 2

More content

##  {background-image="../../assets/images/network.svg"}

::: {.v-center .center}
::: {}

[Thank you!]{.largest}

[Questions?]{.larger}

[{{< meta current_year >}}  • [Tealium](https://github.com/royfrancis/tealium)]{.smaller}

:::
:::
